svg.title: BharatRakshak AI — Complete System Architecture
svg.desc: Full-stack architecture showing Next.js frontend, Express API gateway, FastAPI AI services, MongoDB Atlas, and external integrations across four tiers.

g.text: App Router · TypeScript · Tailwind CSS · React Server Components
Vercel Edge Network · PWA · WebSocket client
JWT Auth · Rate limiting · CORS · Request routing · Redis cache
Helmet.js · Morgan logger · Multer (media upload) · Bull queues
